rationale: Reorganizes the AccountsView Connection hub in src/components/AccountsView.jsx. Removes the 'Add Manually' and 'Connect with Plaid' buttons from the page header (keeping only HouseholdProfilesControl) and relocates them into the Plaid status panel's right-aligned action row, alongside a new account picker `<select aria-label='Choose account to edit or remove'>` (with a 'Account…' default option and accounts sorted via localeCompare) and Edit / Remove|Disconnect buttons gated on `hubManageAccount` (resolved via `hubManageAccountId && accounts.some(a=>a.id===id)`). Per-row Edit/Disconnect/Delete buttons are stripped from each account tile, leaving only the balance figure right-aligned. Adds `setHubManageAccountId('')` to the delete-success path so the picker resets after removal. Pure UI reorganization matching the PR title 'Accounts: edit/remove in Connection hub only (clean cards)'; no behavior or test weakening.
